segment.source: Renders a full newsletter section with eyebrow, headline, and subheadline above a card containing the embedded subscription form and an optional privacy reassurance line, plus an optional checklist of benefit bullets beside it. Use it for: newsletter pitches that list what subscribers get, 'join our mailing list' sections with value propositions, email lead-capture blocks. Prefer 'Newsletter Inline' for a slim mid-page strip; 'Newsletter Footer' at the page end.
